title: Jackson Heights Greenmarket
address: 34th Ave & 79th Street &, 80th St, Jackson Heights, NY 11372, USA
description: Known as our Queens flagship, the Jackson Heights Greenmarket has connected local farms and farmers to the residents of this Jackson Heights neighborhood since 2000. Every Sunday, year-round, families, long-time residents and young couples can find a diverse selection of locally-grown and produced foods throughout the market. Beyond shopping, visitors can enjoy cooking demonstrations, educational […]

title: Les Petites Gallery
description: Les Petites Gallery is LIVE NYC’s only permitted Open Air Art Gallery on an Open Street. Les Petites Gallery hits the street every Sunday May 17 — Dec 20 | 9am-6pm 34th Ave between 82nd & 83rd St | Near the 7 train We worked hard with the NYC DOT for this. It’s real, it’s […]

title: Lao Lao’s Dumplings | Pages in the Park
description: This is our Pages in the Park series held in Travers Park every Sunday from May – October! It is a free literary event but if you would like to reserve a copy to have it personalized by author/illustrator please use the link to purchase your copy! About The Book Millie loves to help LaoLao […]

title: I Don’t Kiss and Tell Romance Book Club: Get A Life, Chloe Brown! by Talia Hibbert
description: Join May’s Romance Book Club pick Get A Life, Chloe Brown! by Talia Hibbert on May 24 at 1pm: Chloe Brown is a chronically ill, plus-size computer geek with a goal, a plan, and a list. After almost—but not quite—dying, she’s come up with seven directives to help her “Get a Life”, and she’s already completed the […]

title: Paint & Print with Pride with SeparatingSkies and Justin
description: Join Jasmin of separatingskies and Justin to screen print, block print, and paint signs for pride month in June to use in marches, hang at home, or share with neighbors. Participants are encouraged to bring cardboard, shirts, and tote bags to print and paint on. Donation based – Fundraiser Love Wins NYC – An LGBTQ+ […]

title: 34 Ave Bike classes – all ages
description: Bike lessons for all ages at 93 St. Clase para aprender a montar en bicicleta (para adultos y niños) Gracias a @ciclistasNy por proporcionar bicicletas para las clases and thank you to @citibike for sponsoring the helmets. Sponsored by the @34_Ave Open Streets Coalition.

title: Zine Folding Social with Nodutdol
description: Come join Nodutdol, a local anti-imperialist Korean community organization, for casual conversation, zine folding, and delicious Korean summer drinks and snacks! Pick up political zines, read and learn together, and connect with community organizers. This event is open to all!

title: Queens NY Practical Philosophy Meetup
description: WHAT’S PRACTICAL PHILOSOPHY ABOUT? Practical Philosophy is a weekly meet-up that brings critical thinkers together for an opportunity to dive deep on a topic, practice communicating, and building a community. All with no ‘official’ philosophy knowledge required! Practical Philosophy is based on the idea that philosophy should be accessible to all, and not something reserved […]

title: Miss Maybell & Charlie Judkins Live
address: 36-01 36th Ave, Long Island City, NY 11106, USA
description: Join us for this sweet trip with Miss Maybell and Charlie to the early 1900s! Miss Maybell & Charlie Judkins Live is brought to you by UkeHut proudly with our musical friendship grown in Queens. “Miss Maybell plays banjo and taps her steel brushes on a tricked-out washboard. She also commands an impressive kazoo, but the secret […]

title: Improv Night
description: No scripts, no safety nets—just pure comedy created in the moment. Come see why Grove 34 is THE place for improv comedy in Queens. Follow @improvnight and @grove34nyc for cast announcements and show-specific details!

title: SHEFFA MUSIC TRIO | Candombe Jazz Concert & Jam
description: A vibrant night of jazz fusion rooted in Uruguayan Candombe and Río de la Plata rhythms, featuring original music and bold reimaginings by pianist Martin “Sheffa” Giorgieff, bassist Nacho Mateu, and drummer Juan Chiavassa, followed by an open Candombe jam session. 7:30 PM – 8:30 PM (First Set Concert ) 9:30 PM – 10:30 PM […]
